Title: Alfin-like transcription factor VqAL4 regulates a stilbene synthase to enhance powdery mildew resistance in grapevine

Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Strongly induced by Uncinula necator, peaking at 2 dpi; strongly induced by salicylic acid, peaking at 48 hpt; identified from highly expressed ripe-berry transcript cluster 11
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Powdery mildew infection by Uncinula necator; exogenous salicylic acid treatment
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Key enzyme for stilbene biosynthesis; specific rate-limiting status not established in this paper
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Type III polyketide synthase; STS family; N-terminally truncated protein lacking 48 amino acids relative to VqSTS1
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Resveratrol/stilbene phytoalexin branch of phenylpropanoid metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Condenses p-coumaroyl-CoA with malonyl-CoA to form resveratrol, leading to downstream stilbenes including trans-piceid, ε-viniferin, pterostilbene, and trans-piceatannol
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Antifungal defense and enhanced resistance to powdery mildew; resveratrol in human diet has beneficial health effects
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes accumulation of stilbenes and enhances grapevine resistance to Uncinula necator; increases free salicylic acid and PR1-associated defense signaling
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Stable overexpression in Thompson Seedless; transient RNAi silencing in Danfeng-2; HPLC metabolite profiling; pathogen inoculation phenotyping; RT-qPCR of defense genes
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq/transcriptome analysis of Danfeng-2 berries; accession NA
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful gene for engineering stilbene-enriched, powdery mildew-resistant grapevine; may be stacked with upstream regulators such as VqAL4
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: VqNSTS4 is a truncated STS encoding 345 aa but remained functional in planta; RNAi construct simultaneously knocked down VqNSTS4 and highly similar VqSTS1
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. VqNSTS4 was the most strongly inducible novel STS by powdery mildew and SA among the new VqNSTS members. 2. Overexpression in Thompson Seedless increased trans-piceid, trans-resveratrol, ε-viniferin, and other stilbenes and reduced fungal growth/sporulation. 3. Silencing VqNSTS4/STS1 in Danfeng-2 reduced stilbenes, SA content, and resistance, supporting a positive causal role in stilbene-mediated defense.

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Alfin-like transcription factor with DUF3594 Alfin-like domain and C-terminal PHD finger domain
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Highest in mature leaves, then young leaves, lowest in roots; induced by Uncinula necator, salicylic acid, and abscisic acid
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: In transgenic Thompson Seedless overexpression lines, ectopically elevated
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Powdery mildew infection by Uncinula necator; exogenous salicylic acid and abscisic acid treatments
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Uncinula necator infection; salicylic acid; abscisic acid
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Directly binds the G-rich CACCTC/GAGGTG element in the VqNSTS4 promoter and activates transcription; also activates VvSTS32
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Stilbene biosynthesis and associated defense/SA signaling activation
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Novel positive regulator that directly activates a key stilbene synthase and increases antifungal stilbene accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Antifungal defense and enhanced resistance to powdery mildew; resveratrol-related human health benefits
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Enhances stilbene accumulation and powdery mildew resistance; increases SA and H2O2 accumulation and defense gene expression
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y1H; promoter deletion/mutation assays; dual-luciferase assay; ChIP-qPCR; transient overexpression/RNAi in Danfeng-2; stable overexpression in Thompson Seedless; pathogen assay; HPLC metabolite profiling
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: Coexpression analysis using transcriptome data of Danfeng-2 berries; RNA-seq accession NA
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Strong candidate regulator for breeding or metabolic engineering of powdery mildew-resistant, stilbene-enriched grapevine; useful for transcriptional activation strategies and gene stacking with STS targets
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: VqAL4 showed transcription activation activity in yeast; direct binding depended on the G-rich motif in the VqNSTS4 promoter; also upregulated endogenous VvSTS genes in Thompson Seedless
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. VqAL4 is a nucleus-localized Alfin-like transcription factor induced by powdery mildew and SA. 2. It directly binds the G-rich element in the VqNSTS4 promoter and activates VqNSTS4 transcription. 3. Overexpression increased stilbenes, SA, H2O2, defense gene expression, and resistance to U. necator, whereas RNAi silencing reduced resistance.
